title: Pakistan Drone Threat Before Punjab Polls? Drugs & Arms Smuggling Attempts Surge | Breaking News
description: | A fresh surge in alleged drone-based smuggling attempts involving drugs and illegal arms has raised security concerns along the Punjab border ahead of key political developments.According to inputs, security agencies are closely monitoring increased drone activity and suspected cross-border smuggling networks operating near sensitive border areas.
